_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Extract data using data carving techniques (e.g., Forensic Tool Kit [FTK], Foremost).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, including rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection, and rights related to automated decision-making and profiling.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.378), DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.371).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.8/10 (raw 0.181). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [carving, extract, foremost, forensic, ftk, kit] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.817 (P=0.814, R=0.820). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 30-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.7%). "Extract data using data carving techniques (e.g., Forensic Tool Kit [FTK], Forem" and "Knowledge of data subject rights under applicable data protection regulations, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.398 > STS 0.181 (gap +0.217). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.9%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [carving, extract, foremost, forensic, ftk, kit]. WIDAI-only: [access, applicable, automated, decision, erasure, knowledge].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.217 with low STS 0.181. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
